caption: This boy right next to me is not less than my own child. I have always been as protective as a mother to him. He has never given us any reasons to complaint. If he says it, he does it. Someone who is diligent and hardworking. This boy right here graduated as Er. Pranav Guglani, BTech Civil Engineering from IIT Ropar today. A proud moment for the entire family today. Hardwork Paid Off. Super Proud of you my kiddo ♥️🧿🥂. . . . #graduation #graduationday

Hello! I am Arzoie | आरज़ोई meaning Ardaas, Wish, Prayer. Thats what my parents say “ They made a wish and I came True.” 🫰 Also, I have just turned 1 Month old. 🧿🌻. Everyone at home calls me ZooZoo 🫶🏻. You can too! 👧♥️ . . #onemonthold❤️ #onemontholfbabygirl #babygirl

Yesterday, I had the honor of meeting our esteemed Prime Minister, @narendramodi ji. During our brief conversation, he congratulated me on the outstanding work done by @bjym4chd in the ongoing @bjp4india ‘s membership drive, which I have been leading. I humbly thank @bjp4chandigarh State President @jatinderpalmalhotraofficial ji for giving me this opportunity.

💙 PULSE POLIO DAY | 28 JUNE 💙 Every child deserves a healthy, polio-free future. 🌍✨ 🩺 What is Polio? Polio is a viral disease that can cause lifelong paralysis in children. The good news? It is preventable with vaccination. 👶 Who should take the polio drops? ✅ All children from 0–5 years, including: • Newborns • Children who have already received routine vaccinations 📅 When? 💧 28th June (Pulse Polio Day) at government polio booths. Routine polio vaccine doses are also given at: • Birth • 6 weeks • 10 weeks • 14 weeks 📍 Where? FREE at: • Government hospitals • Anganwadi centres • Pulse Polio booths in schools & public places 💙 Why give the drops again if my child is already vaccinated? These extra polio drops strengthen immunity and help protect every child in the community. 💧 Just 2 drops = Lifelong Protection Don’t miss it! Visit your nearest Pulse Polio booth on 28th June and help keep our children safe. 📲 Save this post and share it with parents, family, and friends to spread awareness. #PulsePolioDay #PolioFreeIndia #EndPolio #2DropsLifeLongProtection #ChildHealth Vaccination HealthyKids Parenting MomAwareness Immunization PublicHealth India BabyCare SpreadAwareness
